nasb.text: When He arrived at the place, He said to them, “Pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

esv.text: And when he came to the place, he said to them, “Pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

cnv.text: 到了那裡，他對門徒說：“你們應當禱告，免得陷入試探。”

ccb.text: 到了山上，祂对门徒说：“你们要祷告，以免陷入诱惑！”

csbs.text: 到了那地方，耶稣对他们说：“你们要祷告，免得陷入试探。”
